# ProWorx Mobile Detailing

> Premium mobile auto detailing, paint correction, and ceramic coating in Charlotte, NC and surrounding areas.

## About

ProWorx Mobile Detailing is Charlotte's GYEON & IGL certified ceramic coating and paint protection specialist. We offer professional-grade ceramic coating packages with 1-year to 10-year protection, precision paint correction, and premium full detailing services. Serving Charlotte, Waxhaw, Matthews, Indian Trail, Mint Hill, and surrounding areas with mobile service and convenient drop-off options. 5-star rated with 53+ reviews.

## Services

- Inside & Out Detailing (Standard, Premium, Elite)
- Interior Detail
- Exterior Detail
- Ceramic Coating (GYEON certified — 1yr, 3yr, 10yr)
- Paint Correction (single-stage and multi-stage)
- Fleet Detailing
- Boat Detailing
- Monthly Maintenance Plans

## Hours

- Monday–Friday: 9:30 AM – 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:30 AM – 3:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed
